_comment: CONTRACT 1.3.0 (task M2-T006): a last-known-good serve with the typed staleness object - served_from_cache + stale true, upstream_error_type, original_retrieved_at equal to reproducibility.retrieved_at, monotonic age - alongside the RETAINED human-readable connector note. connector_notes: served_from_last_known_good: upstream failure (source_unavailable) at 2026-07-16T12:02:00Z; serving the last-known-good official snapshot retrieved at 2026-07-16T12:00:00Z (age 120s at serve time).
